server.name: neuroverse-governance
server.description: Deterministic governance engine for AI agents. Evaluates actions against world rules and plan constraints. Returns ALLOW, BLOCK, or PAUSE verdicts.

tools.name: neuroverse_guard
tools.description: Evaluate whether an agent action is allowed by governance rules. Returns ALLOW, BLOCK, or PAUSE.

intent.description: What the agent wants to do

tools.name: neuroverse_plan_check
tools.description: Check whether an action matches a step in the active plan. Returns ON_PLAN, OFF_PLAN, CONSTRAINT_VIOLATED, or PLAN_COMPLETE.

intent.description: What the agent wants to do

tools.name: neuroverse_plan_advance
tools.description: Mark a plan step as completed. In verified mode, requires evidence for steps with a verify field.

evidenceType.description: Evidence type (must match step verify field)

tools.name: neuroverse_plan_status
tools.description: Get current plan progress — completed steps, total steps, percentage.
